calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Susan Lo Der, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Petitioner's request to change of name that is not listed on the Petition and not of published, request is DENIED without prejudice.
